Mission Control · EST 2022

Dorian's
Blast Off to 4!

14 DAYS UNTIL THE BIG LAUNCH

We need YOU on the crew! Join us as we count down to Dorian's 4th trip around the sun.

Sunday, May 17th

Parking
  1. Drive toward the marina from Schiller St. and Clement Ave.
  2. Turn left
  3. Park in the parking lot, near the Launch community breezeway
🛴
Gear Up & Roll Out
We're taking the mission outside! Bring bikes, scooters, skates, or whatever you ride — the launch pad has room for the whole crew.

Fuel up on cake, cosmic snacks, and out-of-this-world fun.

👨‍🚀 ✨ 🌙

All little astronauts welcome.

🎁 Gifts are not expected — your crew showing up is more than enough!

If you'd like to bring something, Dorian loves puzzles, games, and personal challenges that keep him moving and thinking. He's obsessed with space 🚀, dinosaurs 🦕, and pretend play. Active toys for outside (or inside) are always a hit. He wears a size 6/7 in clothes.
